options.label: All on inactive, all off inactive
All on inactive, all off active
All on active, all off inactive
All on active, all off active

paramInformation.label: Sending Commands to Group 1 Devices (S1)
paramInformation.description: Double click functionality requires parameter 15 set to 1

options.label: Commands sent when device is turned on and off
Commands sent when turned off, double click turns on to last state
Commands sent when turned off, double click turns on to 100%

paramInformation.label: S2: Check Device Status Before Sending Control Frame
paramInformation.description: Not possible if roller blind switch is chosen in parameter 14. Requires parameter 19 set to 0.

paramInformation.label: Time of Manual Dimming Between Extreme Values
Time of Automatic Dimming Between Extreme Values
paramInformation.description: Value 0 is required for inductive and capacitive devices unsuitable for dimming, e.g. fluorescent lamps and motors

paramInformation.label: Maximum Dimming Level
paramInformation.description: May not be lower than the minimum level set in parameter 13

paramInformation.label: Minimum Dimming Level
paramInformation.description: May not be higher than the maximum level set in parameter 12

options.label: Roller blind switch (Two switches operate the dimmer)

paramInformation.label: 3-Way Switch Function
paramInformation.description: A second switch connected to S2 also controls the dimmer

paramInformation.label: Synchronizing Light Level for Associated Devices
Toggle Switch Behavior
paramInformation.description: Determines how the device state follows a toggle switch

options.label: Device changes status on switch status change
Device status depends on switch status

paramInformation.label: Control Impulse Length
paramInformation.description: Default is 110 for 50 Hz and 101 for 60 Hz. Extending the control impulse decreases the minimum dimmer level, e.g. to completely dim LED bulbs.

paramInformation.label: Control Impulse Length
paramInformation.description: Default is 110 for 50 Hz and 101 for 60 Hz. Extending the control impulse decreases the minimum dimmer level, e.g. to completely dim LED bulbs.

paramInformation.label: Response to Alarm (Any Type)
paramInformation.description: General alarm, water flooding, smoke, CO, CO2 or temperature alarm

paramInformation.label: Updating the Dimming Level without the Switch
paramInformation.description: The parameter's value changes depending on the dimming level

paramInformation.label: Updating the Dimming Level without the Switch
paramInformation.description: The parameter's value changes depending on the dimming level

paramInformation.label: Scene Activation Functionality
paramInformation.description: Sends Scene Activation commands to association group 3

metadata.inclusion: Quickly press the push-button connected to the S1 terminal or the B-button three times. For a toggle switch, perform 3 position changes.
metadata.exclusion: Quickly press the push-button connected to the S1 terminal or the B-button three times. For a toggle switch, perform 3 position changes.
metadata.reset: Press and hold the B-button for 3 seconds after connecting mains voltage to the device.
